About Me

Fresher Engineer Ready to Make an Impact

I'm a fresh ECE graduate from Balaji Institute of Technology & Science, Narsampet, with a strong academic foundation in Electronics & Communication Engineering (CGPA: 7.0).

I have hands-on expertise in VLSI Semiconductor Design, Embedded Systems, Java Full Stack, Python, and Web Development — built through real projects and industry-recognised virtual internships.

I'm actively seeking my first full-time opportunity where I can contribute, grow, and solve meaningful engineering challenges. Quick learner, team player, and passionate about continuous improvement.

Portfolio

Featured Projects

Handpicked projects that showcase skills and passion

🚀 AI-Powered Resume Analyzer & Job Recommender
Developed a monorepo application designed to automate resume screening using AI. The system intelligently matches candidate profiles with relevant job roles using NLP and machine learning. Built with Python and Full-Stack web technologies for an end-to-end production-ready solution.
Python Full-Stack Dev AI/ML NLP
📡 IR Wireless Underwater Communication System
Designed and implemented a short-range underwater communication system using infrared (IR) light for data transmission. Utilised IR LEDs and photodiodes to establish wireless communication between submerged transmitter and receiver modules. Optimised modulation and signal processing to minimise attenuation and noise underwater.
IR Communication Embedded Systems Electronics Signal Processing
🚑 Ambulance Tracking System using 4G/5G Technology
Developed a real-time GPS-based ambulance tracking system to enable faster emergency response and hospital coordination. Integrated 4G/5G modules for high-speed, low-latency communication between ambulance units and control centres. Implemented live location tracking on an interactive map interface for dispatch teams.
IoT GPS/GSM 4G/5G Modules Embedded Systems
